amendmentNumber.description: ordinal of this lease amendment as written, e.g. 'Fifth' or 'Second'

amendmentDate.description: date this amendment is made as of, in YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. '2018-03-15'

landlordName.description: full legal name of the landlord party, e.g. 'Maple Holdings, LLC'

tenantName.description: full legal name of the tenant party, e.g. 'Acme Robotics, Inc.'

rrExpansionSquareFeet.description: rentable square feet of the RR (Receiving Room) Expansion Premises, e.g. 9000

prSecondFloorExpansionSquareFeet.description: rentable square feet of the PR Second Floor Expansion Premises, e.g. 5000

baseRentSchedule.description: one flat entry per period bucket per expansion premises across all base rent tables

premisesName.description: name of the expansion premises this rent row applies to, e.g. 'RR Expansion Premises'

periodMonths.description: the months-following-expansion-date bucket exactly as labeled, e.g. '1 - 12' or '85 - Expiration Date'

annualRatePerSquareFoot.description: annual base rent per rentable square foot for this bucket, e.g. 22.5

monthlyRent.description: monthly base rent dollar amount for this bucket, e.g. 16875.0
